permitted: Accessory buildings/uses (private garage, guesthouse, residential staff quarters)
Keeping of horses (max 2 head per acre)

zones.source_citation: Zoning Ordinance Article X, Sec. 1001, Table 1001-A1 & Table 1001-A2 (Ord. 2021-01)
zones.notes: 175,000 sf = 4.02 acres. Table 1001-A1: lots with a primary building built prior to 6/13/1991 use front/rear/side-with-frontage = 40 (used here); lots without require 100 ft. Side 20 min, but 40 for buildings 2 stories or >24 ft (footnote 2). max_height_ft=30 (lot >=4 ac). max_far 0.25 = Table 'Maximum Floor Area Ratio' 25%. No separate lot-coverage % (TBD). Height is lot-size-based per Table 1001-A2: <3 ac=24, 3-<4 ac=26, >=4 ac=30. Source: official Town PDF (DocumentCenter/View/117), curl with browser UA. Cover-sheet PDF in the folder was unusable.

permitted: Keeping of horses (max 2 head per acre)

zones.source_citation: Zoning Ordinance Article X, Sec. 1001, Table 1001-A1 & Table 1001-A2 (Ord. 2021-01)
zones.notes: 43,560 sf = 1.0 acre. max_height_ft=24 at min lot (<3 ac); rises to 26/30 on larger lots per Table 1001-A2. Also subject to 20% sky-plane height rule (R-43/R-175 non-hillside). max_far 0.25 = Table 25%. No separate lot-coverage % (TBD). Source: official Town PDF, curl with browser UA.

zones.source_citation: Zoning Ordinance Article X, Sec. 1001, Table 1001-A1 & Table 1001-A2 (Ord. 2021-01)
zones.notes: Side 20 min; per footnote 3, any second story must be set back 40, and on single-story buildings any portion >24 ft set back 40. max_height_ft=24 at min lot. max_far 0.25 = Table 25%. No separate lot-coverage % (TBD). Height lot-size-based (Table 1001-A2). Source: official Town PDF, curl with browser UA.

zones.source_citation: Zoning Ordinance Article X, Sec. 1001, Table 1001-A1 & Table 1001-A2 (Ord. 2021-01)
zones.notes: R-35A applies only to annexed subdivisions Firebrand Ranch and Mountain View Estates Replat. Side 15 min; footnote 3 second-story/over-24-ft 40-ft setback rule applies. Max 1 story. max_height_ft=24 at min lot. max_far 0.25. No separate lot-coverage % (TBD). Source: official Town PDF, curl with browser UA.

zones.source_citation: Zoning Ordinance Article X, Sec. 1001, Table 1001-A1 & Table 1001-A2 (Ord. 2021-01)
zones.notes: Side 20. Max 1 story. max_height_ft=24 at min lot. max_far 0.25 = Table 25%. No separate lot-coverage % (TBD). Height lot-size-based (Table 1001-A2). Source: official Town PDF, curl with browser UA.

zones.source_citation: Zoning Ordinance Article X, Sec. 1001, Table 1001-A1 & Table 1001-A2 (Ord. 2021-01)
zones.notes: R-18A applies only to specified annexed subdivisions (Firebrand Ranch, Mountain View Estates Replat, Arcadia Square, Orange Valley Estates No 3, Grosse Point Two, Quail Vista). Front 35, side 10, rear 35, side/rear-with-frontage 35. Max 1 story. max_height_ft=24 at min lot. max_far 0.25. No separate lot-coverage % (TBD). Source: official Town PDF, curl with browser UA.

zones.source_citation: Zoning Ordinance Article X, Sec. 1001, Table 1001-A1 & Table 1001-A2 (Ord. 2021-01)
zones.notes: R-10 applies only to annexed subdivisions Mountain Shadows East/West and Colonia Miramonte. Setbacks (front 20, side 7, rear 25, side/rear-with-frontage 20) apply 'or as shown on a previously recorded plat, or as existing at time of annexation' (footnote 4). Maximum Floor Area Ratio = 'None' per Table 1001-A1, so max_far=TBD. Max 1 story. max_height_ft=24 at min lot. Horses/livestock/poultry prohibited. Source: official Town PDF (DocumentCenter/View/117 + View/116), curl with browser UA.
